title: desmodium langlasseanum
intro: Desmodium langlasseanum, also known as Langlasse's tick trefoil, is a perennial plant native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Desmodium langlasseanum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Desmodium langlasseanum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations.
